message:
fix(ufunc): propagate integer sidecar through itemset, putmask, and copyto mutations

Replace inline integer_sidecar update in itemset with the centralized
write_integer_mutation helper, matching the pattern already used elsewhere.

Update putmask to return Result<(), UFuncError> and call
write_integer_mutation for each masked write, preserving large exact
integer values (beyond 2^53) from the source sidecar and rejecting
fractional writes into integer-typed arrays.

Extend copyto to propagate integer sidecar data element-by-element for
both masked and unmasked paths, ensuring round-trip fidelity for i64/u64
storage.

Add comprehensive tests covering:
- itemset materializing sidecar for large exact values
- itemset rejecting fractional writes into integer arrays
- putmask preserving large sidecar values through masked assignment
- putmask rejecting inexact bridge values
- copyto preserving large sidecar values
- copyto rejecting inexact bridge values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
